title: CCA Extension Nights + Weekends
description: A studio exhibition showcasing work by CCA Extension faculty and students from the Fall 2025 and Winter/Spring 2026 terms.

image.alt: Illustrated banner for CCA Extension's Nights + Weekends exhibition: a cyan neon sign reading "Nights & Weekends" with a crescent moon inside the "N" and a yellow sunburst rising from the final "s", set above a stylized purple-and-magenta nighttime cityscape of warehouses, a footbridge, and a distant skyline.
